$description: Alert / banner component tokens — prominent feedback messages for success, warning, danger, and info states. Reuses the same semantic color pairings as badge variants but at surface scale (full-width banner rather than inline chip). All foreground/background pairs verified WCAG AA.

alert.$description: Inline notification banners. Each variant maps to a feedback color role. Use for form-level feedback, async status, and system messages — not for inline validation (use rr-input's error-text for that).

background.$description: Dark green tint — same as badge.success.background. Calm confirmation surface.

foreground.$description: Phosphor green text/icon — foreground.success (#4ADE6E). Contrast vs success-alt: 11.1:1 AAA.

border.$description: Matches background — borderless on dark tint.

background.$description: Dark amber tint — warning-alt (#221B08). Low-alarm caution surface.

foreground.$description: Vivid amber text/icon — foreground.warning (#FCD34D). Contrast vs warning-alt: 12.0:1 AAA.

background.$description: Subtle error tint — danger-alt. Low alarm for banner context.

foreground.$description: Red text/icon — foreground.danger (#F87171). Contrast vs danger-alt fill: 6.62:1 AA.

border.$description: Matches background — borderless, consistent with the other status variants (success/warning/info).

background.$description: Dark blue tint — info-alt (#0D1830). Calm informational surface.

foreground.$description: Light blue text/icon — foreground.info (#93C5FD). Contrast vs info-alt: 7.5:1 AA.

radius.$description: Alert corner radius — 8px. Matches cards and dropdowns; reads as a surface component, not an inline chip.
